chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2670 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.11874/2022 2. For hearing of main case 30.01.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, similar controversy has been decided by the Division Bench of this Court vide judgment dated 24.11.2020, in the case of Continental Biscuit vs. Federation of Pakistan and others (CP D 1916 of 2016 and other connected matters). He states that since the judgment is binding on this Court, therefore, this petition may be disposed of upon the same terms, subject to the right of the appeal of the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
